channel.title: Goodly Blog — SEO Tips for Small Businesses
channel.description: Practical SEO tips for small businesses. No jargon. Just stuff that works.

item.title: 10 SEO Mistakes Small Businesses Make (And How to Fix Them)
item.description: Most small business websites are invisible to Google. Here are the 10 most common mistakes — and exactly how to fix each one in under an hour.

item.title: How to Rank #1 on Google in 2025: The Complete Guide
item.description: Google's algorithm changes constantly. Here's what actually works in 2025 — from on-page SEO to backlinks to AI visibility.

item.title: Instagram for Small Business: Complete Guide to Getting Customers
item.description: Instagram isn't just for influencers. Learn how local businesses are using Instagram to fill their appointment books and sell out inventory.

item.title: What Is Google Business Profile and Why Every Local Business Needs One
item.description: 76% of local searches result in a visit within 24 hours. If your Google Business Profile isn't optimized, you're losing customers every day.

item.title: Is Your Business Visible to ChatGPT and Siri? Why AI Visibility Matters
item.description: 1 in 4 local searches now happen through AI assistants. If ChatGPT doesn't know about your business, you're invisible to a growing audience.

item.title: Why Page Speed Is a Ranking Factor (And How to Fix Yours)
item.description: Google penalizes slow sites. A 1-second delay can cost you 7% of conversions. Here's how to check your speed and fix common issues.
